reviews.author: Julio Larios
reviews.text:
Outstanding company . Timely, friendly, efficient and best of all, trustworthy. They are  versatile and have solutions to most of my moving challenges .
Fully recommended !

reviews.author: breanna xxx
reviews.text: made moving so easy for me we’re on time and helped me assemble my furniture they were super professional and I will recommend them to anybody!

reviews.author: Mike
reviews.text:
This was far and away the most outstanding moving company that I have ever used. And I have moved 6 times with various large and small companies previously. Andy, the owner is a true professional, with extremely fair pricing.  His workers were of a quality and expertise that is rarely found in the moving industry, and they were able to move a very large spa across uneven and difficult terrain
- doing so in a very careful manner.  I recommend them to anyone that values their personal effects, because Andy and his team will treat your furnishings with the utmost care. Easily the best moving experience I have had.
Mike

reviews.author: Lastena Shahid
reviews.text: I don’t even know where to start. We found this company at the last minute for our recent move. They were very accommodating with the last minute booking changes, as our new building had very strict rules. Kara was super helpful with taking my calls and remained super kind and professional in spite of my changing needs.  Andy and another young man showed up to our home punctual and ready to move. They took exceptional car of our furniture, taking apart pieces to  make sure they stayed in tact during transport. We ran across a roadblock when my new building wouldn’t allow us to move in because of our arrival time. What was I supposed to do with my furniture?! Andy came up with a quick and safe solution that didn’t break my pockets as we would have to pay for storage overnight for my items. The next day they arrived at the new apartment to unload the furniture and were very swift and efficient. Throughout the whole process they were very professional and kind! They made me forget that I was stressing out the day prior. I would definitely use this company and I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Geisabeth Castillo
reviews.text: 💯 % Satisfecha

reviews.author: NFC Nicaragua
reviews.text: These guys did an outstanding job today. They came 15min early and got to work, all my stuff got wrapped in blue blankets and handled with care. I jus told them where I wanted everything there they put it. They disassembled all my furniture and put back together. Fair pricing for all the work they did…so Rapid Panda Highly recommended.

reviews.author: XR_T_strat 112
reviews.text: Andy and his crew are professionals. I immediately received an accurate quote with fair pricing. They showed up on time and got right to work. They were very delicate and caring of my belongings, wrapping things so they wouldn’t be scratched or damaged in the move. I would highly recommend to any family member or friend. Can’t say enough about how pleased I am that I chose them!!

reviews.author: Alex Texidor
reviews.text:
The team at Rapid Panda Movers came highly recommended by the management at my new apartment.  Andy was really friendly and transparent about pricing during the quote.

On moving day the team pulled up promptly at 9am.  Their truck and equipment was clean and organized.  They wrapped and secured everything really well and followed all the instructions when they unloaded the truck at my new apartment.

Moving is a stressful process and using Rapid Panda Movers made for a smoother moving day experience.  I highly recommend Rapid Panda Movers and am definitely using them again.

reviews.author: Mike Hefty
reviews.text: These guys ROCKED!!! They were fast but cautious, and moved a huge amount of my belongings in a short amount of time. Andy gave me a spot on quote, and his men even helped us load some items onto a separate trailer that was going to storage. These guys went above and beyond and I would definitely use them again in the future.

reviews.author: Ellen Goldberg
reviews.text: Rapid Panda was excellent. Professional, competitive pricing (better, actually), responsive to calls and your texts, and really pleasant to deal with. We couldn’t be happier, and highly recommend the company.

reviews.author: Esteban Obando
reviews.text: Awesome guys! They really save me in a hard move!

reviews.author: Bianca Li
reviews.text: Andy was super responsive when I needed a last-minute long-distance mover. The team was incredibly fast at everything: packing the items that I hadn't been able to box myself, moving my belongings out of my apartment, driving to my new location, and dropping my belongings off in my new house. The cost of the move was also very transparent from the start.

reviews.author: Maria Vittori
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about this moving company! We were going to rent a Uhaul truck to drive up to Palm Coast, FL (about a 4hr drive from Miami) only to discover upon pick up that Uhaul would not allow us to leave the city of Miami with the Uhaul truck we reserved! We had to quickly find a solution. We called Rapid Panda Movers and spoke to Andy, the owner, who was not only professional and courteous, but also willing to accommodate us at last minute for the next-day. He quoted us a great rate for the 12 hours we needed. We were still a little hesitant and we were finally able to line up renting a long distance Penske truck - but at more than half the cost of RPM, and with RPM we would save 12 hours and not need to do any heavy lifting- we ultimately decided to go with RPM. BEST DECISION EVER!! Andy and his team were extremely punctual, meticulous and careful with all of our things, and personable. They were fantastic overall! They took all of the furniture to my aunt’s house in Palm Coast, and my aunt had an excellent experience with them - Andy and his team helped her arrange things in her home and assembled all the furniture for her. She loved them so much she asked if they could bring some of her furniture to my cousin’s house that lives by her for only $130 -right there and then Andy agreed and his team got to work on the second job! Over all Rapid Panda Movers impressed the entire family. I highly highly recommend and will be using them in the future! If you’re on the fence about who to use for your move - your search ends here!

reviews.author: Amex Amexamex
reviews.text:
Panda Moving ha sido una excelente experiencia. Muy profesionales, trabajadores, respetuosos, detallistas  y todo dentro del servicio y el tiempo acordado. Desde su llegada al sitio desde donde fueron a buscar mis muebles y cajas  en Miami y hasta Pompano Beach, donde llevaron mis cosas. Los recomiendo ampliamente sin ningún tipo de dudas.
Arturo C Guevara.

reviews.author: Lilianeth Cajina
reviews.text:
Muchas Gracias por su buen servicio, atención al cliente y su responsabilidad.
Andy siempre está velando porque se cumpla el trabajo a cabalidad, cuidan muy bien tus cosas, rápidos en el traslado y siempre con una excelente sonrisa.

Postdata: Son súper precios! Y el trabajo que realizan genial

reviews.author: Symone Ford
reviews.text: Andy and his Team are amazing and lifesavers! Very quick, responsive and professional. So pleased with how the service turned out to be, can’t thank them enough for a job well done!

reviews.author: Sparkle Christine
reviews.text: They were so great to work with! From the initial call where he was so reassuring to the arrival and prompt service. I was already overwhelmed with such a rigorous move but they made me feel very comfortable with booking their services. I highly recommend this company. They took care with my belongings and was considerate on where and how to place them. Not to mention this move was on the third floor in blistering temps. You won’t go wrong with this company!

reviews.author: Kellie Flowers
reviews.text: Rapid panda movers are amazing!! The best and most efficient moving service I have ever used. They were responsive, professional, and moved all my furniture incredibly fast, safe and sound. I accidentally dropped my sunglasses and broke them and one of the movers even fixed them for me. Seriously the best service, I highly recommend these guys!

reviews.author: N F
reviews.text: Man let me tell you, I needed a move the SAME DAY, asap, I hit Andy up and his crew came in clutch. Within 2 hours he pulled up and moved EVERYTHING 5 hours north with a smile! The price beat every competitor. Very quick and professional, definitely go with these guys it’s the best you can get. Thank you team 👍

reviews.author: Andre Killion
reviews.text: I recently moved from Chicago to S. Florida. I saw the add for Rapid Panda movers and read some of the reviews. The feedback made me feel comfortable enough to reserve their services. When I got to S. Florida I had issues with the moving company who was transporting my items from Chicago. This caused my move-in to be delayed by a week. Rapid Panda movers was very accommodating and quick to communicate back and forth as well as reschedule a few times while I was figuring out a new arrival date of my things. The day of the move-in Andy and team arrived on time as promised and knocked out the unloading of the truck quickly. The team was professional and handled my items with care. I will definitely be using them for future moves. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Diana Davis
reviews.text: I recently moved from Ft. Lauderdale to Orlando. I have had bad experiences with past movers. A friend referred me to Rapid Panda Movers as he had just used their services as well. Andy and his team are great! They are professional and very efficient. Andy always answered his phone and answered any questions or concerns I had. I totally recommend them and will use them again for any future moves. I can now say, I have had a great experience with my move!

reviews.author: Grace Hoffman
reviews.text: Rapid Panda Movers accommodated my move in 2 days. They were reliable, respond quickly and were very professional. I will highly recommend their team!

reviews.author: elias DAMMOUS
reviews.text: Andy’s service was amazing!

reviews.author: Michael Salsberry
reviews.text: Honest and reliable company that does great work at a reasonable price. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Davinia Segovia
reviews.text: Professional and reliable.  Discussed the needs and expectations of our family's move. Everything was done well  .

reviews.author: Caroline Gomez
reviews.text: Seriously the BEST movers EVER! Andy, Gonzalo, and Jorge are incredible. They were punctual, professional, in and out sooo fast, so careful with all our things, and the NICEST guys on top of it all! Their prices are very reasonable too! Look no further- hire these guys today!

reviews.author: ROXANA BALLARINO
reviews.text: Muy buen trabajo Andy y sus 2 compañeros , muy agradecida por su ayuda, mi casa no era fácil ya que está en una pequeña colina, pero ellos tuvieron el mejor servicio y muy buen a actitud en todo momento, los recomiendo100%.

reviews.author: Tiffany Nicole Swanson
reviews.text: I wish I could give more stars! They were early, ready, courteous, felt such southern hospitality, friendly, and got the job done. I don't know if I could have had a more seamless experience. They treated my possessions with such care. I really appreciate you guys showing up and showing out. I reserved the evening before and after getting 8 No's from other companies due to being full, you guys were my first Yes! So happy to know your work now.

reviews.author: Prince Hall
reviews.text: I greatly appreciate all the help, these guys were wonderful, I recommend this company to all that need great movers.

reviews.author: pierre nicolas
reviews.text: Excelente el top

reviews.author: Sharon Bolivar
reviews.text:
Great Service from the moment they arrive ! Andy and his team did an excellent job taking care of my move. I moved from a 3rd floor apartment and they handled everything with care! I highly recommend if you are looking for a trust worthy moving service !

** honest review **

reviews.author: Leonardo de Oliveira
reviews.text: Great service! Andy and his crew are very good!!

reviews.author: faisal javed
reviews.text: our move was longer then usual from south FL to north of GA but it was great with Rapid Panda movers, nothing broke or lost, they arrived well before time on loading and unloading day and waited patiently outside for us before we are ready to let them in, they were fast but not rushing things, overall it was great service lead by Andy

reviews.author: Aaron Molina
reviews.text: Rapid Panda Movers are hands down the best moving company in Miami. From start to finish, the team at Rapid Panda were honest, fast and extremely careful with all of our belongings. They helped us move from our apartment to our new home and also assisted with storing the rest of our things. I highly recommend Rapid Panda Movers for anyone in need of a reliable and efficient moving company. 5 stars! Speak with Andy!

reviews.author: Kimberly Gonzalez
reviews.text: Move was incredibly easy and affordable! Had a previous mover cancel on me a day before my move and when I scheduled for rapid panda they came out the next day and handled everything swiftly! Truly a great experience. Thank you!

reviews.author: Arlenes Garcia
reviews.text: Amazing crew of professionals. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Dores Gonzalez
reviews.text: I called on a Friday afternoon and they were able to fit me in on Saturday. Arrived on time and good customer service

reviews.author: Padmajaa R
reviews.text: I want to share with you all how amazing this team is ! A little late post though as I want to take time to share this experience and write it down .. We planned our move 2 months earlier and we booked a moving company who was supposed to show on the day of my move at 8am. All small things were packed waiting for the movers to pack and move the big stuffs … My husband is reaching out to the company we had booked .. they said they are on the way and we wait every 30 minutes we call and kept checking … but they never showed up until 11.. I quickly searched in google to see movers available in 33155 zip code and Rapid Panda showed up . Andy picked up and patiently listened to my conversation as explained above 👆I did not expect that they would be able to accept a last minute request but surprisingly Andy mentioned Can you let me know the stuffs you have in place and We are here to help you. All I would need 2 hours of time to coordinate the crew and they will be coming to your location by 12 ! Due to my bitter experience that morning with the other team I kept checking with Andy in intervals and he was so kind to keep me updated ! By 1 the 2 men showed up fully functional… Those two are so amazing they were so quick , very detail oriented and accomplished all that I requested and finally saved my day ! I felt Andy like a god that day ! Best movers I would recommend who can be relied upon and help the ones in need

reviews.author: John Tetzeli
reviews.text:
If there were more stsrs I’d give them to Andy and his crew
The best!

reviews.author: Jimmy Macias
reviews.text: I just had a move on Wednesday, guys showed up on time and were very efficient!!!

reviews.author: Eliud Rizo zeledon
reviews.text: This company was by far the MOST HONEST guys I’ve ever come across. I Zelled their payment twice without realizing it and kept going with my day. Later on that day I got a phone call from Andy to let me know that I had paid double and proceeded to return the extra money. You don’t see this level of honesty anymore. Definitely RAPID PANDA RECOMMENDED!!!

reviews.author: Sterling Consultants LLC
reviews.text:
I highly recommend Rapid Panda for anyone looking for a quality moving experience. Andy is a professional and runs a very tight ship. I have used this company more than once, and they are always on time, offer the highest quality service, and are very fair with their pricing.  Andy’s workers were of a quality and expertise that is rarely found in the moving industry, Andy and his team will treat your property like its is their own-  absolutely the best moving experience!.
Mike

reviews.author: Kimberly Gonzalez
reviews.text: The two movers that helped me were phenomenal. Both took their job very seriously and handled all my items with care which was greatly appreciated. Even after all the issues with my apartment building, the movers handled everything perfectly and in a timely manner. Truly thankful for the work and Professionalism shown by the team. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jake Greene
reviews.text: Exceptional work by the team at Rapid Panda! Andy, who leads the team, was on top of scheduling, very helpful, and informative. His crew showed up early, were all very accommodating and polite. I will continue to use Rapid Panda for any future moves, undoubtedly. Thanks Andy and the Rapid Panda team!

reviews.author: ALFREDO CARRANZA
reviews.text: Very detail  movers    Highly recomended

reviews.author: Beach
reviews.text: Fast and efficient service and extremely awesome communication , Stop totally reliable I highly recommend!!!!

reviews.author: Stephanie Asim
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of meeting the kind gentleman from Rapid Panda to assist with my move. They were professional, organized, and tidy!  Andy and his team made sure I was comfortable, I was left with little to do settling into my new place. I highly recommend RAPID PANDA for your move😊🔥

reviews.author: Fatima Chamorro
reviews.text: These guys were fantastic. Very friendly and helpful. Their price was fair for the quality of service.  You wont regret hiring them. I fully recommend them.

reviews.author: Carlos Gamero
reviews.text: Excelent service and gentle team

reviews.author: Jennifer Pineda
reviews.text: Excellent service. Great guys. I will use them again. I recommend this company.
